## What this PR does

One paragraph summary. Link to related issue with `Closes #N` / `Fixes #N` if any.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Asset contribution (new PNG sprite or texture)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Test plan

How to verify this works:

```bash
swift build
swift test
swift run GitCity
# Then: ...
```

For UI changes — attach a screenshot or short screen recording.

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` passes locally
- [ ] `swift test` passes locally (if XCTest is available)
- [ ] No new compiler warnings
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant (`docs/`, inline comments)
- [ ] No personal data / secrets / hard-coded paths in the diff
- [ ] For asset PRs: technical checklist in `docs/CONTRIBUTING-ASSETS.md` followed
